$comment: Curated FACTUAL anchors extracted from player guides (Voltrox747 move list + glitch FAQ, Sabre929 borg list, Fury_Hikari walkthrough, t3h_chosen_1 ninja guide) supplied in-session. Facts only, paraphrased; confidence tier OBSERVED_GUIDE — player-measured, never DERIVED. Damage values were measured by the guide author against a level-7 Neo G Red unless noted (stagger-prone moves vs Blizzard Dragon). Use as trace anchors (T1/T2/T7/T8/T9/T10) and validation vectors; never port numbers directly. See behavior-notes.md (an).

idEncodingValidation.$comment: Glitch-FAQ force codes = sum of 2^(force-1) = the game's two-byte borg id (family<<8|variant). Roster-validated exact matches.

levelColorEncoding.expRule: 2 exp per battle participation (1 on loss/quit); exp-to-level varies per borg (10/20/40)

moveAttributes.SB: breaks through shields (at least one hit)
moveAttributes.MH: continuous hits while in contact (rehit-interval family)
moveAttributes.WV: emits wave projectile with the swing

ammoRechargeAnchors.$comment: Guide 'Recharge: Yes' = regenerates without emptying first (gradual); 'No' = all-at-once family. Cross-validate vs stat-row refillType (behavior-notes (am)).

examples.borg: pl0503 CYBER DEATH DRAGON (Death Head/Cyber Dragon lineage)

examples.note: shots never stagger the victim (record with tiny gauge damage — good damage-record probe)

specialRefillModes: deployed-return: Demon Samurai skulls, Elemental Knight fist, Megaton Robot head, Tao Master swords, Cyber Girl Super/Hyper remotes, Mechanical/Cyber Dragon pods — fire blocked until the object returns/dies
on-expiry-return: Time/Remote Bomber floating bombs free a slot when they explode
instant-restore-on-transform: transforming machine borgs restore all ammo on transform

statusObservations.source: Poison Worm (+20 over time), Venom Worm (+26)
statusObservations.note: on-hit DoT exists; corpus DoT-loop negative is revised (see vampire drain)

statusObservations.source: Ice/Blizzard Dragon B projectile direct hit
statusObservations.note: mashing buttons/directions shortens the freeze — links the +0x550 mash counter as a status-recovery consumer candidate
victims attackable; stagger-locked; ~115 max observed on Neo G
spins victim, aim lost, movement unaffected

statusObservations.source: Death Borg Omicron X charge (to Death Eye), Bug Witch X (to Roach)
Quick/Slow Valkrie B charge shot on target
Arrow Ninja/Shijima X arrows (8 ammo, stackable position tethers)

barrierAnchors.source: GUARD WITCH X (blocks the TARGET's own shots, fired at an enemy)

swordGrowth.rule: swords lengthen as enemies die (any killer)

nurseHeals.note: heals ally OR enemy; re-use blocked until target's heal animation ends

contactDamage.$comment: Contact damage is AUTHORED PER-BORG, not engine-global (mechanic L refinement).

examples.move: stepping on borgs (walking or airborne feet contact)

examples.note: no normal melee at all — touch attacks only

examples.borg: DEATH ICBM / WALKING BOMB / DEATH BOMB
examples.note: suicide is collision-scripted, not a button; owner dies by own move (consistent with unconditional owner exclusion, (al))

damageFormulaVectors.$comment: End-to-end validation targets once level floats are wired (measured vs level-7 Neo G Red).

examples.observed: ~500 vs large borgs; outright kill vs most

fusionControlNote: Guide states the co-op fused machine splits ATTACKS vs MOVEMENT between the two players — conflicts with the corpus reading of one shared command struct ((aj)); resolve via trace T3.
